news.t: Defiance ETFs Launches BMNZ: the First 2X Short ETF of BitMine Immersion Technologies, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: BMNZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 217.82%, US DOLLARS at 61.83%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 10.75%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 2.27%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at -12.03%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short BMNR ETF (BMNZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of BitMine Immersion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BMNR), less fees and expenses. BMNZ was launched on Nov 12, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
